title: `dateTrunc` giving incorrect result on Date32 column value
description:
### Company or project name
### Describe the unexpected behaviour
I’m testing the dateTrunc function on a Date32 column, but it’s not producing the expected results. Are there any known or open issues related to this? I’m testing with both the minimum and maximum values, considering that Date32 shares the same date range as DateTime64.
https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/034d5f11-df01-409f-bf3c-0f9980e6f66b
### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
Tried on `25.3.6.56`
### How to reproduce
Example:
```
CREATE TABLE test(dt Date32) Engine = Log;
insert into test values ('2299-12-31');
INSERT into test values ('1900-01-01');
SELECT dt, dateTrunc('day', dt) from test;
```
Output:
```
+------------+----------------------+
|         dt | dateTrunc('day', dt) |
+------------+----------------------+
1. | 2299-12-31 |  2027-10-17 11:03:28 |
+------------+----------------------+
2. | 1900-01-01 |  2036-02-07 06:28:16 |
+------------+----------------------+
```
### Expected behavior
_No response_
### Error message and/or stacktrace
_No response_
### Additional context
_No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1(dt DATE, value INT);
SELECT dt, DATE_TRUNC('day', dt) AS truncated_date FROM test1 WHERE value = 1;
SELECT dt, DATE_TRUNC('month', dt) AS truncated_month FROM test1 WHERE dt IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: dateTrunc function on Date32 column produces incorrect results
